description: Workstream branch + clean fast-forward reconcile — STEP 0.0 passes, STEP 0.1 merges clean, frontier-scan proceeds.
expected_result: PASS — no HALT; auto-reconcile succeeds; orchestrator advances to frontier-scan
load_bearing_assertion: STEP 0.0 does not HALT because current branch is not master/main. STEP 0.1 runs git merge origin/main --ff-only; clean fast-forward exits 0. Orchestrator proceeds past STEP 0 sub-steps.
separates_from_defect_by: no-enforce-non-master defect would not block master; no-auto-reconcile defect would skip the reconcile entirely (dirty state undetected). Golden: both sub-steps run correctly.
